title: vicia dumetorum
intro: Vicia dumetorum, also known as Bitter Vetch or Bitter Vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vicia dumetorum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and relieve symptoms of various ailments.
